title: aspidium alcicorne
intro: Aspidium alcicorne, also known as the Alcicorn fern or Lady fern, is a species of fern in the family Aspidiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as its ability to act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Aspidium alcicorne include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is said to be beneficial for its expectorant properties.
